titleStmt.title: SII 40.21: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 21. (A.R. No. B. 541 of 1929.) Jeṭṭipālem, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab built into the compound wall of Hanumān temple.
This is dated Śaka 1545, Rudhirōdgārin, Āshāḍha, śu. 11, corresponding to 1623 A.D., June 28, Saturday.

Damaged. Mentions probably a gift by in Veṅkaṭabhaṭlaṁgāru, son of Ayitambhaṭlu and grandson of Vaḍlamāni Vīraṁbhaṭlaṁgāru of Jeṭṭipālem for the merit of his parents, Ayilaṁbhaṭla and Tirumalamma (Timmakka of the above inscription).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīrāmā
śāli vāhana śakavarṣaṁbbulu 1545 A
gunēṭi rudhurōdgāri saṁvvatsara Ā
ṣāḍha śuddha 11 lu yajana yājana
Adhyayana Adhyāpakadāna dānapra
tigraha ṣaṭkarma niratulaina vaḍḍamā
ni vīraṁbhaṭlaṁgāri pautṛlaina AI
taṁbhaṭlaṁgāri putṛlaina vēṁkkaṭa
bhaṭlaṁgāru jeṭṭipālepu grāmā
nanu tama taṁḍri Ayilaṁbhaṭlaṁgā
rikinni tamatalli tirumalammaṁgārikinni
tama tōḍanibuṭṭina Anna koṁḍku bhaṭlu
kini tama komāruḍu yaṟṟa
Digital edition of SII 40.21 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
